subcodes.first_line: O loving friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Though from the hardships of travel, the boundless trials and tribulations, and the constant striving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء هر چند از مشقات سفر و زحمات بیحد و حصر و سعی و کوشش
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @unity; oneness of humanity
